chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1663 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 25.10.2016. Mr. Liaquat Sangrasi, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith DSP Ali Muhammad Mughal, SDPO Tando Jam., SIP Javed Akhtar on bhelaf of DIG Hyderabad, SIP Muhammad Changal on bhelaf of SSP Hyderabad, and SIP Umer Din Bozdar P.S Tando Jam. -.-.-. Today, replies on behalf of official respondents have been submitted. Respondent No.2, the concerned SSP, has mentioned that primarily the dispute is between the private respondents and petitioners over cultivation of a piece of land which, according to petitioners, belongs to them. However, at this juncture, petitioners’ main anxiety is that police officials are patronizing the private respondents due to which they are unable to use and cultivate their agricultural land. In the reply submitted by the official respondents, they have categorically mentioned that they have performed in past and they will perform in future their official duties in just, proper and reasonable manner as required by law. The present petition is disposed of with the directions to official respondents that they should conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and to ensure that petitioners are not harassed by private respondents. The official respondents are further directed to provide protection to the petitioners if so requested by them. JUDGE
